query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.name,
  u.email,
  u.openId,
  u.loginMethod,
  u.isPremium,
  COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as track_count
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN tracks t ON t.userId = u.id
GROUP BY u.id
HAVING track_count > 0 OR u.name LIKE '%Randall%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marrs%' OR u.email LIKE '%maritan%'
ORDER BY track_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
